tasks.subject: Task 1: Server-side body-size guard + images: field parsing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reject oversize requests with 413; validate images: field count/size/format; leave no-images path unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/api_wrapper.py:_handle_chat_completions (around line 4543)
- Test: tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_images_validation.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Content-Length > 25MB → 413
- > 4 images → 400 'max 4 images'
- > 5MB per image → 400 'image N exceeds 5 MB'
- Unsupported MIME → 400 'unsupported image format'
- No images: field → unchanged behavior

**Verify:** pytest tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_images_validation.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/api_wrapper.py", "tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_images_validation.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_images_validation.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["25MB cap → 413", "5 images → 400", "6MB image → 400", "HEIC → 400", "no-images regression-free"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Two-round VLM→chat flow when images: present
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When image_blobs non-empty, run VLM round once with all images, inject description as system message, continue normal chat-stream flow.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/api_wrapper.py:_stream_chat_sse_impl
- Test: tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_two_round_vlm.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 1 image → describe_images called once with [blob]
- 2 images → describe_images called once with [a, b]
- Round 2 sees [image_descriptions] system msg before user turn
- Chat round still uses chat lane (llm_interactive)
- VLM failure → graceful chat reply containing cause
- No images → no describe_images call (no regression)

**Verify:** pytest tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_two_round_vlm.py tests/core/ -k chat -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/api_wrapper.py", "tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_two_round_vlm.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_two_round_vlm.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single VLM call covers all images", "system msg injected before user turn", "VLM failure surfaces in context", "no-images path unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: WebUI chat-input attachment queue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Operator can paste / drop / pick 1-4 images. Thumbnail chips with remove-X. Send POSTs images: array.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Ctrl+V image attaches
- Drag-drop image attaches
- File-picker button opens multi-select
- Up to 4 chips with remove-X
- 5th attempt shows inline 'max 4' notice
- Per-image >5MB or unsupported MIME rejected client-side
- Send clears queue + renders user-bubble thumbnails

**Verify:** Hand-test in browser.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser hand-test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["paste/drop/picker work", "chip queue with remove-X", "max-4 enforcement", "size + format guards", "send renders user bubble inline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: WebUI styles for attachment chips
tasks.description:
**Goal:** .chat-attachment-row + .chat-attachment-chip + .chat-attachment-remove styles.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 40x40 chips, 6px gap, wraps narrow widths
- Inner img object-fit: cover
- Remove-X button overlaid top-right
- .chat-user-bubble reuses Slice 1 .chat-inline-image class

**Verify:** Hand-check.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.css"], "verifyCommand": "manual visual check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chip size + gap correct", "remove-X positioned", "user-bubble reuses Slice 1 class"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Live-probe smoke + slice closeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm deployed container handles real image-bearing chat turn end-to-end.

**Files:** None (verification only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Drop JPEG → user thumbnail + GLaDOS describes
- Container log: vlm preflight: 1 image(s), description NN chars
- Drop 5 images → 5th client-side rejected
- 6MB JPEG → client-side rejected
- curl with 5 images → 400 'max 4 images'
- curl with 6MB image → 400 'image 0 exceeds 5 MB'
- curl with Content-Length 30MB → 413

**Verify:** Operator-witnessed.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual live-probe + curl scripts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path describes", "client guards work", "server guards return 4xx", "413 for oversize body"]}
```
